decision_priority_order.trigger: any evidence row or rch state has local_fallback_marker_detected == true
all evidence rows are advisory_only and lab_replay_metadata.replay_backed == false
fresh supported evidence with admissible remote proof capacity

non_claims: This contract does not enable runtime admission or brownout behavior.
This contract does not prove real-host throughput, scheduler performance, RCH fleet health, or production-safe autonomous control.
This contract does not authorize local Cargo fallback for remote-required proof lanes.
This contract does not mutate Agent Mail, Beads, reservations, git branches, or worktrees.

scenarios.description: Fresh replay-backed evidence, low pressure, and an admissible remote worker allow required work to proceed.
Fresh replay-backed evidence with high memory pressure sheds optional work without blocking required cleanup and proof safety surfaces.

decision_receipt.non_action_reason: optional work exceeds memory pressure budget

scenarios.description: Remote-required proof work with no admissible remote worker records a no-win defer without authorizing local Cargo fallback.

decision_receipt.non_action_reason: remote-required lane has no admissible remote worker; local fallback refused

scenarios.description: Advisory-only live signals without lab or replay backing fail closed before any governor action.

decision_receipt.non_action_reason: advisory evidence lacks lab or replay backing
non_claims: advisory-only signals are not behavior proof

scenarios.description: Any local RCH fallback marker fails closed even if other pressure fields look healthy.

non_claims: local fallback cannot validate remote proof

scenarios.description: Malformed snapshots fail before evidence interpretation.
A snapshot missing the required RCH proof-lane evidence class fails closed before acting on partial data.

decision_receipt.non_action_reason: required evidence class rch_proof_lane is missing

scenarios.description: Any stale required evidence row fails closed even when the rest of the snapshot is complete.

decision_receipt.non_action_reason: required region pressure evidence is stale
